channel.title: Shops on eddie
channel.description: Recent content in Shops on eddie

item.title: cammy
item.description: BETA UNITS IN PRODUCTION PREORDER SOON INCLUDED Carrier board Raspberry Pi Computer Module 5 (16gb RAM) 2x IMX cameras 1x 18650 battery 1x 1TB NVMe Fasteners and mounts TECH SPECS Single 18650 battery power 2x 22-pin MIPI CSI-2 cameras M.2 Key M 2230 (PCIe 2.0) RP2354 microcontroller LSM6DSV 6-axis IMU SPH0645LM4H I2S Microphone USB-A 3.0 SuperSpeed USB-C charging, data, & CM5 boot flashing micro HDMI video output 2x user input buttons User RGB LED 4-pin fan connector
